headline: Deere’s Right to Repair Settlement and Software Access Shift Might Change The Case For Investing In (DE)
summary: In early April 2026, Deere & Company reached a settlement agreement, including a US$99.00 million class settlement fund, to resolve multidistrict “right to repair” litigation in US federal court, without any finding of wrongdoing and subject to court approval. By committing to broaden access to repair tools, manuals, and diagnostic software, Deere is reshaping how farmers and independent providers maintain increasingly complex equipment. We’ll now examine how resolving this right-to-repair...
